result.stderr:
acuk.aws.cli 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 accommodation.co.uk

  -n, --name                 The name of the secret to be retrieved

  --verbose                  (Default: false) Prints all messages to standard
                             output.

  -k, --key                  specifies the what secret should be retrieved if
                             they are stored in KVP format

  -r, --aws-region           set the AWS region (if not specified in the
                             AWS_REGION environment variable

  -u, --aws-secret-key-id    set the AWS secret key id (if not specified in the
                             AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID environment variable

  -p, --aws-secret-key       set the AWS secret key access key (if not specified
                             in the AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY environment variable

  -l, --list                 (Default: false) list all the secrets

  --listkeys                 (Default: false) list all the keys for the
                             specified secret

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.

acuk.aws.cli 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 accommodation.co.uk

  -n, --name                 The name of the secret to be retrieved

  --verbose                  (Default: false) Prints all messages to standard
                             output.

  -p, --aws-secret-key       set the AWS secret key access key (if not specified

options.description: Prints all messages to standard output.
list all the keys for the specified secret
set the AWS region (if not specified in the AWS_REGION environment variable
set the AWS secret key access key (if not specified in the AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY environment variable
set the AWS secret key id (if not specified in the AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID environment variable
